name: Algebraic Topology — Part 2: Simplicial Homology
description: Simplex, simplicial complex, chain groups, simplicial homology, Euler characteristic. Depends on Part 1 (homological algebra).
mermaid:
graph TD
    RefTop["Topological space"]
    RefChain["Chain complex (Part 1)"]
    DefSimplex["Def: k-simplex"]
    DefFace["Def: Face of simplex"]
    DefSimpComp["Def: Simplicial complex K"]
    DefOrientation["Def: Oriented simplex"]
    DefChainGroup["Def: Chain group C_k(K)"]
    DefBoundSimp["Def: Boundary ∂ on C_k(K)"]
    LemBoundSqSimp["Lem: ∂² = 0 for simplicial chains"]
    DefSimpHom["Def: Simplicial homology H_k(K)"]
    DefReduced["Def: Reduced homology H̃_n"]
    ThmH0Conn["Thm: H_0 ≅ Z^c for c path components"]
    DefEuler["Def: Euler characteristic χ(K)"]
    ThmEulerAlt["Thm: χ = Σ (-1)^k rank H_k"]
    LemBetti["Lem: Betti numbers b_k = rank H_k"]
    ThmInvariance["Thm: H_* invariant under subdivision"]
    RefTop --> DefSimpComp
    RefChain --> DefChainGroup
    DefSimplex --> DefFace
    DefSimplex --> DefSimpComp
    DefFace --> DefSimpComp
    DefSimpComp --> DefOrientation
    DefOrientation --> DefChainGroup
    DefChainGroup --> DefBoundSimp
    DefBoundSimp --> LemBoundSqSimp
    LemBoundSqSimp --> DefSimpHom
    DefSimpHom --> DefReduced
    DefSimpHom --> ThmH0Conn
    DefSimpComp --> DefEuler
    DefSimpHom --> LemBetti
    LemBetti --> ThmEulerAlt
    DefEuler --> ThmEulerAlt
    DefSimpHom --> ThmInvariance
